label: Transparent scallop shell motif
prompt: Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout chroma-key source. Primary request: Create only an isolated scallop shell motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text. Subject: A single accurate scallop shell, fan-shaped with strong radial ribs and a small hinge, shell cream and porcelain ivory base, pale sea-blue shadows in the grooves, coral-pink fan ridges and warm peach edge accents, pearly nacre highlights, subtle sand-worn texture, crisp marine shell detail. The motif should read as "coral fan shell cream blue" and support a radial menu system. Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the entire shell without cropping, symmetrical fan spread, hinge at bottom, ribs radiating outward. Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves the cream, blue, coral, and pearly shell colors without a cast shadow. Transparent workflow: place the shell on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for local background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the shell. Constraints: no seabed scene, no water, no sand floor, no pearls, no second shell, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no text, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Scallop light-mode design-system board. Input image role: Use the transparent scallop shell motif as the source reference for palette, radial structure, texture, contrast, spacing mood, and visual language. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Scallop", derived from the scallop shell cutout. The system mood is a radial menu system for marine seabed interfaces. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable section labels and short UI labels; sparse enough to survive gallery preview downscaling; avoid dense tiny paragraphs. Required visible sections: Morphous Scallop, Scallop Shell, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Radial Menu, Dashboard/Data, Charts, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status States, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Reference use: Extract colors from the scallop shell: shell cream, porcelain ivory, pale nacre blue, foam blue shadows, coral fan ridges, peach shell edge, sand beige, pearl highlight, and deep seabed slate for ink. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, radial menu control with fan segments, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, area chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing scale, radius scale, border samples, shadow samples, texture swatches, data cards, and simple product icons. Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px maximum radius, quiet shell-cream light surfaces, coral primary actions, nacre blue focus rings, pale blue chart accents, seabed slate text, radial dividers that echo scallop ribs, subtle pearly texture overlays, fan-shaped menu patterns. Typography: show English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance, with short readable Japanese samples such as ナビゲーション, 検索, 状態, データ, and メニュー. Use multilingual product UI font guidance, not decorative type. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; avoid unrelated saturated colors, generic purple/blue gradients, and one-note blue or coral dominance. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Scallop" or "Scallop Shell", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous Scallop dark-mode design-system board. Input image roles: Use the transparent scallop shell motif as the source motif reference, and use the light-mode Morphous Scallop board as the layout and component-language reference. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Scallop". It must feel like the same light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the scallop shell cutout. Keep the radial menu system mood. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board with large readable section labels and short UI labels; sparse enough to survive gallery preview downscaling; avoid dense tiny paragraphs. Required visible sections: Morphous Scallop, Scallop Shell, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Radial Menu, Dashboard/Data, Charts, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status States, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Reference use: Preserve the light board's section coverage, radial menu panel, fan-segment controls, navigation pattern, cards, charts, forms, table, search palette, status states, token rows, texture samples, 8px radius, and spacing system. Visual details: dark background derived from deep seabed slate and shadowed shell grooves; foreground from pearl ivory and shell cream; primary actions from coral fan ridges; accents from nacre blue and foam blue; surfaces from dark blue-gray shell shadow and muted slate; borders from pearly shell lines; subtle radial rib texture overlays, crisp restrained shadows, and fan-shaped menu dividers. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, radial menu control, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, area chart, empty/loading/error states, forms, tables, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, and shadows. Typography: show English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance, with short readable Japanese samples such as ナビゲーション, 検索, 状態, データ, and メニュー. Use multilingual product UI font guidance. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no one-note blue/coral dominance. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Scallop" or "Scallop Shell", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
